title: Gaia Source Proposal
description: Schema for a single source-curation proposal emitted by an automated crawler during a dry-run pass. A proposal represents a discovered evidence source for a named skill, pre-validated for schema fitness but NOT yet ingested into the canonical registry. Proposals are tool-agnostic: any crawler backend (Firecrawl, Haunt API, Puppeteer, GitHub API, etc.) can produce them.

proposalId.description: Unique identifier for this proposal. Format: <skillId>-<shortHash>-<timestamp>. Must be deterministic for idempotency.

skillId.description: Named skill ID in contributor/skill-name format. Proposals target named skills only (evidence accrues at the named layer).

genericSkillRef.description: Optional reference to the abstract generic skill this named skill maps to. Informational; used by the adversarial gate to cross-check relevance.

source.description: URL of the discovered evidence source. Must be a full, resolvable HTTP(S) URL.

evidenceType.description: Evidence type from meta.json evidence.types taxonomy (e.g. github-stars-own, arxiv, social-signal, peer-review, benchmark-result, repo-own, proxy-containment). The crawler must map its discovery to a known type.

numericPayload.description: Type-specific numeric data required by the Trust Magnitude formula. Shape depends on evidenceType. Optional for types that use flat magnitude (e.g. self-attestation).

stars.description: GitHub stargazer count. Used by github-stars-own and proxy-containment types.

citations.description: Academic citation count. Used by arxiv type.

percentile.description: Benchmark percentile rank. Used by benchmark-result type.

reviewers.description: Number of distinct reviewers. Used by peer-review type.

views.description: View count. Used by social-signal type.

likes.description: Like/upvote count. Used by social-signal type.

comments.description: Comment count. Used by social-signal type.

commits.description: Commit count. Used by repo-own type.

contributors.description: Contributor count. Used by repo-own type.

origins.description: Number of graded origins. Used by fusion-recipe type.

verifiers.description: Number of distinct verifiers. Used by verifier-attestation type.

externalStars.description: Stars on the external containing project. Used by proxy-containment type.

skillCountInRepo.description: Number of skills in the repo (mothership divisor). Used by github-stars-own type.

discoveredAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the crawler discovered this source.

discoveredBy.description: Identity of the bot or agent that produced this proposal. For automated curation: 'nova-gaia'.

crawlerBackend.description: Name of the tool/API that performed the discovery (e.g. 'firecrawl-search', 'github-api', 'youtube-data-api', 'haunt', 'puppeteer', 'arxiv-api', 'hackernews-algolia'). Tool-agnostic: any backend that can fill this contract is valid.

crawlerVersion.description: Optional version string of the crawler backend for reproducibility.

confidence.description: Crawler's self-assessed confidence that this source is genuine, relevant, and correctly typed. 0.0 = no confidence, 1.0 = certain. Used by the adversarial gate as a triage signal; proposals below the configurable floor are auto-dropped before review.

rationale.description: Human-readable explanation of why this source is relevant to the skill. Must be specific enough for an adversarial reviewer to evaluate without visiting the URL. Subjective wording ('elite', 'best', 'high-quality') should be avoided.

existingEvidenceCheck.description: Idempotency check: did the crawler verify this source is not already in the skill's evidence array?

checked.description: True if the crawler checked for duplicates against the current registry state.

duplicate.description: True if this source URL already exists in the skill's evidence. Duplicate proposals should be excluded from the report but may be logged for audit.

existingIndex.description: If duplicate=true, the 0-based index of the matching evidence row in the skill's current evidence array.

adversarialReview.description: Populated by the adversarial/refute gate after the proposal is generated. Empty or absent during initial dry-run output.

status.description: Outcome of the adversarial review. 'pending' = not yet reviewed. 'accepted' = passed skeptic gate. 'refuted' = rejected (>=2/3 skeptics). 'deferred' = needs human review.

skepticVotes.description: Array of skeptic votes from the 3-skeptic refute pass.

reviewedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the adversarial review completed.

dryRun.description: MUST be true. This proposal was emitted during a dry-run pass (no registry mutation). Auto-PR publishing is not yet implemented.

quotaCost.description: Optional cost/quota accounting for the API calls that produced this proposal. Placeholder for future budget enforcement.

apiCalls.description: Number of API calls consumed to discover this source.

estimatedCostUsd.description: Estimated cost in USD for the API calls.
